docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$215.00) SERVED JUN-16-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, KRISTIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF 08-13-10 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. APPERANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HELLER, HAROLD AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, KRISTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HELLER, HAROLD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROOKS, KRISTIN DISCLOSURE OF PLAINTIFF'S INFORMATION TO HIS PHYSICIAN WAS CONSENTUAL. DISCLOSURE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAMILY MEMBERS WAS UNFORSEEABLE AND UNINTENDED IN THAT LETTER WAS SENT AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST AND ADDRESSED TO HIM SPECIFICALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
